caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT MAN" written across the chest and a black baseball cap with a silver emblem sits in a podcast studio. He wears silver headphones and a gold chain around his neck. In front of him is a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background is a white wall featuring repeating logos with the words "HUSTLE" and gold stars. On-screen overlays include a logo for "BOSS TALK 101" and a "PODCAST" graphic. Throughout the sequence, the man engages in a conversation, shifting his gestures. He begins by raising his hand near his head, then transitions to resting his hand near his chin and chest, and finally opens his hand in a gesturing motion while speaking. His facial expressions shift from focused and thoughtful to actively communicating as he speaks into the microphone.
